contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: AI Agent (software & documentation)
- Amount: 15
- Description: sentiment_importer: one-command two-host deploy script + docs
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1033
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1034
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1035
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/48
  
  Details:
  Time: 15 minutes.
  
  What changed:
  - Added `deploy.sh` at the sentiment_importer repo root. Stages both hosts in parallel (git pull + bundle install while old processes keep serving), runs `rake db:migrate` from seni_sk before any restart, and pre-compiles assets on seni_ror BEFORE restart so the service-down window drops from a full precompile (~minutes) to Rails boot (~11 seconds measured). Flags: `--skip-migrate`, `--ror-only`, `--sk-only`.
  - Fix discovered during live deploy: `SECRET_KEY_BASE` only lives in the systemd unit's `Environment=` directive, so rake invoked over SSH couldn't boot Rails. The script now extracts it via `systemctl show --property=Environment --value` before running rake (applies to both the precompile and migrate paths).
  - Documented the flow in `sentiment_importer/README.md` + `AGENT_WORKFLOW_GUIDE.md`, and added a one-line pointer in `agentic_ai_context/PROJECT_INDEX.md` so future AI agents can reach it from either entry point.
  - Verified end-to-end: `./deploy.sh --skip-migrate` completed cleanly against the live seni_ror + seni_sk hosts; port 3002 open ~11s after restart, sidekiq PID present ~4s after restart.
  
  Why: reduces operator toil on Edgar redeploys and locks in the precompile-before-restart pattern that minimizes production downtime. Future AIs can now run `./deploy.sh` without rediscovering the SSH + systemd wiring from scratch.
  
  GitHub:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1033 — deploy.sh (initial script)
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1034 — README "Deploying to production" section
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1035 — fix: source SECRET_KEY_BASE from systemd
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/48 — PROJECT_INDEX.md pointer for future AIs
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 0
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
